description: Marriage contract (ketubba). Written and signed by Hillel b. ʿEli (fl. 1066–1108 CE). Groom: Seʿadya b. Efrayim. Bride: Turkiyya (? תרכיה). A few phrases from the dowry list are preserved. Also signed by Moshe b. Ṣalḥūn. (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
